datasets.name: ds_azure_kpi
datasets.query: SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) THEN cost END), 2) AS cost_30d, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN usage_date < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) THEN cost END), 2) AS cost_prev_30d FROM dbx_dev.dbx_platform.azure_costs WHERE usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 60)

datasets.name: ds_dbx_kpi
datasets.query: WITH priced AS ( SELECT u.*, u.usage_quantity * lp.pricing.default AS list_cost FROM system.billing.usage u INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.cloud = lp.cloud AND u.sku_name = lp.sku_name AND u.usage_start_time >= lp.price_start_time AND (u.usage_end_time <= lp.price_end_time OR lp.price_end_time IS NULL) WHERE u.usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 60)) SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) THEN list_cost END), 2) AS cost_30d, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN usage_date < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) THEN list_cost END), 2) AS cost_prev_30d FROM priced

datasets.name: ds_forecast_kpi
datasets.query: SELECT ROUND(SUM(p50), 2) AS p50_next_30d, MAX(run_date) AS forecast_run FROM dbx_dev.dbx_platform.cost_forecasts WHERE series = 'total' AND run_date = (SELECT MAX(run_date) FROM dbx_dev.dbx_platform.cost_forecasts) AND target_date > CURRENT_DATE() AND target_date <= DATE_ADD(CURRENT_DATE(), 30)

datasets.name: ds_findings_kpi
datasets.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS findings_7d FROM dbx_dev.dbx_platform.platform_findings WHERE run_ts >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 7) AND action != 'ok'

datasets.name: ds_azure_daily
datasets.query: SELECT usage_date, service_bucket, SUM(cost) AS cost FROM dbx_dev.dbx_platform.azure_costs WHERE usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 90) GROUP BY usage_date, service_bucket

datasets.name: ds_findings_recent
datasets.query: SELECT run_ts, area, check_name, resource, reason, action FROM dbx_dev.dbx_platform.platform_findings WHERE run_ts >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) AND action != 'ok' ORDER BY run_ts DESC LIMIT 100

datasets.name: ds_forecast_total
datasets.query: WITH latest AS (SELECT MAX(run_date) AS run_date FROM dbx_dev.dbx_platform.cost_forecasts) SELECT usage_date AS day, 'actual' AS metric, SUM(cost) AS value FROM dbx_dev.dbx_platform.azure_costs WHERE usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 60) GROUP BY usage_date UNION ALL SELECT target_date, CONCAT('forecast ', quantile), value FROM dbx_dev.dbx_platform.cost_forecasts LATERAL VIEW EXPLODE(MAP('p10', p10, 'p50', p50, 'p90', p90)) AS quantile, value WHERE series = 'total' AND run_date = (SELECT run_date FROM latest)

datasets.name: ds_forecast_buckets
datasets.query: SELECT target_date AS day, series, p50 FROM dbx_dev.dbx_platform.cost_forecasts WHERE series != 'total' AND run_date = (SELECT MAX(run_date) FROM dbx_dev.dbx_platform.cost_forecasts)

datasets.name: ds_azure_services
datasets.query: SELECT service_name, service_bucket, ROUND(SUM(cost), 2) AS cost FROM dbx_dev.dbx_platform.azure_costs WHERE usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) GROUP BY service_name, service_bucket ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_azure_rgs
datasets.query: SELECT resource_group, ROUND(SUM(cost), 2) AS cost FROM dbx_dev.dbx_platform.azure_costs WHERE usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) GROUP BY resource_group ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 20

datasets.name: ds_forecast_monitor
datasets.query: SELECT run_ts, check_name, resource, reason, action FROM dbx_dev.dbx_platform.platform_findings WHERE area = 'forecast' AND run_ts >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 90) ORDER BY run_ts DESC LIMIT 200

datasets.name: ds_dbx_daily
datasets.query: WITH priced AS ( SELECT u.*, u.usage_quantity * lp.pricing.default AS list_cost FROM system.billing.usage u INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.cloud = lp.cloud AND u.sku_name = lp.sku_name AND u.usage_start_time >= lp.price_start_time AND (u.usage_end_time <= lp.price_end_time OR lp.price_end_time IS NULL) WHERE u.usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 90)) SELECT p.usage_date, p.billing_origin_product AS compute_type, COALESCE(wr.workspace_name, p.workspace_id) AS workspace_name, SUM(p.list_cost) AS list_cost FROM priced p LEFT JOIN dbx_dev.dbx_platform.workspace_reference wr ON p.workspace_id = wr.workspace_id GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_dbx_weekly
datasets.query: WITH priced AS ( SELECT u.*, u.usage_quantity * lp.pricing.default AS list_cost FROM system.billing.usage u INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.cloud = lp.cloud AND u.sku_name = lp.sku_name AND u.usage_start_time >= lp.price_start_time AND (u.usage_end_time <= lp.price_end_time OR lp.price_end_time IS NULL) WHERE u.usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 189)), weekly AS ( SELECT DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', usage_date) AS week_start, SUM(list_cost) AS list_cost, COUNT(DISTINCT usage_date) AS days FROM priced GROUP BY 1 HAVING days = 7 ) SELECT week_start, ROUND(list_cost, 2) AS weekly_cost, ROUND(100 * (list_cost - LAG(list_cost) OVER (ORDER BY week_start)) / LAG(list_cost) OVER (ORDER BY week_start), 1) AS wow_growth_pct FROM weekly ORDER BY week_start

datasets.name: ds_jobs_daily
datasets.query: WITH priced AS ( SELECT u.*, u.usage_quantity * lp.pricing.default AS list_cost FROM system.billing.usage u INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.cloud = lp.cloud AND u.sku_name = lp.sku_name AND u.usage_start_time >= lp.price_start_time AND (u.usage_end_time <= lp.price_end_time OR lp.price_end_time IS NULL) WHERE u.usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 90) AND u.billing_origin_product = 'JOBS') SELECT usage_date, IFNULL(dbx_dev.dbx_platform.job_type_from_sku(sku_name), 'UNKNOWN') AS job_type, SUM(list_cost) AS list_cost FROM priced GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_jobs_top
datasets.query: WITH recent_jobs AS ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id, job_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) AS rn FROM system.lakeflow.jobs QUALIFY rn = 1 ), priced AS ( SELECT u.*, u.usage_quantity * lp.pricing.default AS list_cost FROM system.billing.usage u INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.cloud = lp.cloud AND u.sku_name = lp.sku_name AND u.usage_start_time >= lp.price_start_time AND (u.usage_end_time <= lp.price_end_time OR lp.price_end_time IS NULL) WHERE u.usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) AND u.billing_origin_product = 'JOBS' AND u.usage_metadata.job_id IS NOT NULL) SELECT COALESCE(j.name, p.usage_metadata.job_id) AS job_name, dbx_dev.dbx_platform.team_name_from_tags(FIRST(p.custom_tags, TRUE), FIRST(j.tags, TRUE)) AS team, FIRST(p.identity_metadata.run_as, TRUE) AS run_as, COUNT(DISTINCT p.usage_metadata.job_run_id) AS runs, ROUND(SUM(p.list_cost), 2) AS list_cost FROM priced p LEFT JOIN recent_jobs j ON p.workspace_id = j.workspace_id AND p.usage_metadata.job_id = j.job_id GROUP BY p.workspace_id, p.usage_metadata.job_id, j.name ORDER BY list_cost DESC LIMIT 25

datasets.name: ds_jobs_outcome
datasets.query: WITH priced AS ( SELECT u.*, u.usage_quantity * lp.pricing.default AS list_cost FROM system.billing.usage u INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.cloud = lp.cloud AND u.sku_name = lp.sku_name AND u.usage_start_time >= lp.price_start_time AND (u.usage_end_time <= lp.price_end_time OR lp.price_end_time IS NULL) WHERE u.usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) AND u.billing_origin_product = 'JOBS') SELECT p.usage_date, COALESCE(t.result_state, 'RUNNING') AS result_state, SUM(p.list_cost) AS list_cost FROM priced p LEFT JOIN system.lakeflow.job_run_timeline t ON p.workspace_id = t.workspace_id AND p.usage_metadata.job_id = t.job_id AND p.usage_metadata.job_run_id = t.run_id AND p.usage_start_time >= DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', t.period_start_time) AND p.usage_start_time < DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', t.period_end_time) + INTERVAL 1 HOUR GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_jobs_untagged
datasets.query: WITH recent_jobs AS ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY workspace_id, job_id ORDER BY change_time DESC) AS rn FROM system.lakeflow.jobs QUALIFY rn = 1 ), priced AS ( SELECT u.*, u.usage_quantity * lp.pricing.default AS list_cost FROM system.billing.usage u INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.cloud = lp.cloud AND u.sku_name = lp.sku_name AND u.usage_start_time >= lp.price_start_time AND (u.usage_end_time <= lp.price_end_time OR lp.price_end_time IS NULL) WHERE u.usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) AND u.billing_origin_product = 'JOBS' AND u.usage_metadata.job_id IS NOT NULL) SELECT COALESCE(j.name, p.usage_metadata.job_id) AS job_name, FIRST(p.identity_metadata.run_as, TRUE) AS run_as, ROUND(SUM(p.list_cost), 2) AS list_cost FROM priced p INNER JOIN recent_jobs j ON p.workspace_id = j.workspace_id AND p.usage_metadata.job_id = j.job_id WHERE CARDINALITY(j.tags) = 0 AND CARDINALITY(p.custom_tags) = 0 GROUP BY p.workspace_id, p.usage_metadata.job_id, j.name ORDER BY list_cost DESC LIMIT 25

datasets.name: ds_sql_daily
datasets.query: WITH priced AS ( SELECT u.*, u.usage_quantity * lp.pricing.default AS list_cost FROM system.billing.usage u INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.cloud = lp.cloud AND u.sku_name = lp.sku_name AND u.usage_start_time >= lp.price_start_time AND (u.usage_end_time <= lp.price_end_time OR lp.price_end_time IS NULL) WHERE u.usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 90) AND u.billing_origin_product = 'SQL') SELECT p.usage_date, IFNULL(dbx_dev.dbx_platform.sql_type_from_sku(p.sku_name), 'UNKNOWN') AS sql_type, COALESCE(wh.warehouse_name, p.usage_metadata.warehouse_id, 'unknown') AS warehouse_name, SUM(p.list_cost) AS list_cost FROM priced p LEFT JOIN dbx_dev.dbx_platform.warehouse_reference wh ON p.workspace_id = wh.workspace_id AND p.usage_metadata.warehouse_id = wh.warehouse_id GROUP BY ALL

datasets.name: ds_sql_kpi
datasets.query: WITH priced AS ( SELECT u.*, u.usage_quantity * lp.pricing.default AS list_cost FROM system.billing.usage u INNER JOIN system.billing.list_prices lp ON u.cloud = lp.cloud AND u.sku_name = lp.sku_name AND u.usage_start_time >= lp.price_start_time AND (u.usage_end_time <= lp.price_end_time OR lp.price_end_time IS NULL) WHERE u.usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 60) AND u.billing_origin_product = 'SQL') SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN usage_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) THEN list_cost END), 2) AS cost_30d, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN usage_date < DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) THEN list_cost END), 2) AS cost_prev_30d FROM priced

datasets.name: ds_sql_perf
datasets.query: SELECT DATE(start_time) AS day, metric, ROUND(value, 2) AS value FROM ( SELECT start_time, ROUND(AVG(try_divide(total_duration_ms, 1000)) , 2) AS `avg runtime (s)`, ROUND(AVG(try_divide(waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms, 1000)), 2) AS `avg queue (s)`, ROUND(PERCENTILE(try_divide(total_duration_ms, 1000), 0.95), 2) AS `p95 runtime (s)` FROM system.query.history WHERE start_time >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) GROUP BY start_time ) LATERAL VIEW EXPLODE(MAP( 'avg runtime (s)', `avg runtime (s)`, 'avg queue (s)', `avg queue (s)`, 'p95 runtime (s)', `p95 runtime (s)`)) AS metric, value

datasets.name: ds_sql_top_queries
datasets.query: SELECT LEFT(statement_text, 120) AS statement, executed_by, ifnull(statement_type, 'Other') AS statement_type, COUNT(*) AS runs, ROUND(SUM(try_divide(total_duration_ms, 1000)), 1) AS total_runtime_s, ROUND(AVG(try_divide(waiting_at_capacity_duration_ms, 1000)), 1) AS avg_queue_s, ROUND(SUM(read_bytes) / (1024*1024*1024), 2) AS read_gb, MAX(CASE WHEN spilled_local_bytes > 0 THEN 'spill' ELSE '' END) AS spill FROM system.query.history WHERE start_time >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) AND statement_text IS NOT NULL GROUP BY LEFT(statement_text, 120), executed_by, ifnull(statement_type, 'Other') ORDER BY total_runtime_s DESC LIMIT 25

datasets.name: ds_lineage_daily
datasets.query: SELECT event_date AS day, metric, value FROM ( SELECT event_date, COUNT(*) AS `table reads/writes`, COUNT(DISTINCT created_by) AS `active users` FROM system.access.table_lineage WHERE event_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) GROUP BY event_date ) LATERAL VIEW EXPLODE(MAP( 'table reads/writes', `table reads/writes`, 'active users', `active users`)) AS metric, value

datasets.name: ds_catalog_usage
datasets.query: SELECT catalog, IFNULL(entity_type, 'interactive') AS entity_type, COUNT(*) AS events FROM ( SELECT entity_type, EXPLODE(ARRAY_DISTINCT(ARRAY(source_table_catalog, target_table_catalog))) AS catalog FROM system.access.table_lineage WHERE event_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30) ) WHERE catalog IS NOT NULL AND catalog NOT IN ('system', '__databricks_internal') GROUP BY ALL ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 60

datasets.name: ds_unused_tables
datasets.query: WITH written AS ( SELECT target_table_full_name AS table_name, MAX(event_date) AS last_written FROM system.access.table_lineage WHERE event_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 90) AND target_table_full_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ), read_tables AS ( SELECT DISTINCT source_table_full_name AS table_name FROM system.access.table_lineage WHERE event_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 90) AND source_table_full_name IS NOT NULL ) SELECT w.table_name, w.last_written FROM written w LEFT ANTI JOIN read_tables r ON w.table_name = r.table_name INNER JOIN system.information_schema.tables t ON w.table_name = CONCAT(t.table_catalog, '.', t.table_schema, '.', t.table_name) ORDER BY w.last_written DESC LIMIT 50

datasets.name: ds_gov_kpi
datasets.query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT created_by) AS active_users_30d, COUNT(DISTINCT COALESCE(source_table_catalog, target_table_catalog)) AS catalogs_in_use FROM system.access.table_lineage WHERE event_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 30)

datasets.name: ds_findings_by_area
datasets.query: SELECT DATE(run_ts) AS day, area, COUNT(*) AS findings FROM dbx_dev.dbx_platform.platform_findings WHERE run_ts >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), 90) AND action != 'ok' GROUP BY ALL

widget.name: t_ov
widget.textbox_spec:
### Platform overview
One place for spend, forecast, and platform health. Each tab drills into an area; every big number here links to a tab with the detail.

frame.title: Azure bill — 30d
frame.description: vs the previous 30 days

frame.title: Databricks spend — 30d
frame.description: list price, all workspaces

frame.title: Forecast next 30d (P50)
frame.description: latest @champion batch forecast

frame.title: Daily Azure spend by platform component — 90d
frame.description: Stacked bill from the Cost Management API: databricks / foundry_ai / search / storage / other

frame.title: Daily Databricks spend by compute type — 90d
frame.description: jobs / SQL / all-purpose / DLT / model serving, at list price

frame.title: Findings — 7d
frame.description: non-ok rows from all scheduled checks

frame.title: Latest findings — 30d
frame.description: what the scheduled checks flagged, newest first

frame.title: Azure bill — 30d
frame.description: vs the previous 30 days

frame.title: Previous 30d
frame.description: days 31-60

frame.title: Forecast next 30d (P50)
frame.description: latest @champion batch forecast

frame.title: Total spend: actual vs forecast (P10/P50/P90)
frame.description: 60d of actuals against the latest champion forecast and its uncertainty band

frame.title: Daily Azure spend by component — 90d
frame.description: Stacked daily bill from the Cost Management Query API

frame.title: P50 forecast by component
frame.description: latest run, per service bucket

frame.title: Forecast monitor findings — 90d
frame.description: drift and matured-accuracy checks; only non-ok rows appear in Overview

frame.title: Databricks spend — 30d
frame.description: vs the previous 30 days; list price

frame.title: Previous 30d
frame.description: days 31-60

frame.title: Daily spend by compute type
frame.description: responds to the filters above

frame.title: Daily spend by workspace
frame.description: responds to the filters above

frame.title: Spend by compute type
frame.description: share of the filtered window

frame.title: Weekly spend and WoW growth — 26w
frame.description: bars: weekly list cost; line: week-over-week growth %

frame.title: Job spend — 90d
frame.description: all jobs compute, list price

frame.title: Failed-run spend — 30d
frame.description: money burned by runs that did not succeed

frame.title: Untagged job spend — 30d
frame.description: unattributable to any team

frame.title: Daily job spend by SKU type — 90d
frame.description: serverless vs classic vs photon mix over time

frame.title: Job spend by run outcome — 30d
frame.description: SUCCEEDED vs FAILED/TIMED_OUT: reliability with dollars attached

frame.title: Most expensive jobs — 30d
frame.description: top 25 by list cost

frame.title: Untagged jobs — 30d
frame.description: no team/project tags: fix the tags to attribute this spend

frame.title: DBSQL spend — 30d
frame.description: vs the previous 30 days; list price

frame.title: Previous 30d
frame.description: days 31-60

frame.title: Daily DBSQL spend by type — 90d
frame.description: serverless / pro / classic

frame.title: Query performance — 30d
frame.description: rising queue time = under-provisioned; rising p95 = heavy queries

frame.title: Heaviest queries — 30d
frame.description: the optimization hit-list, by total runtime

frame.title: Active users — 30d
frame.description: distinct principals in lineage events

frame.title: Findings — 7d
frame.description: non-ok rows from all scheduled checks

frame.title: Data activity — 30d
frame.description: lineage events and active users per day

frame.title: Catalog usage by entity type — 30d
frame.description: which catalogs are read/written, and by what kind of workload

frame.title: Findings by area — 90d
frame.description: cost / security / governance / housekeeping / ml / forecast

frame.title: Written but never read — 90d
frame.description: tables produced in the window that nothing consumed: deletion/dedup candidates
